videoUrls.title: TikTok video URLs
videoUrls.description: Direct TikTok video URLs to scrape

maxVideosPerSource.title: Max videos per source
maxVideosPerSource.description: Maximum number of videos to scrape per hashtag/profile/keyword

scrapeComments.title: Scrape comments
scrapeComments.description: Whether to scrape comments for each video (slower, costs more)

maxCommentsPerVideo.title: Max comments per video
maxCommentsPerVideo.description: Maximum number of comments to scrape per video (only if scrapeComments is true)

scrapeMusic.title: Scrape music/audio info
scrapeMusic.description: Whether to include music/audio data in output

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: ⚠️ Highly Recommended: Use RESIDENTIAL proxies to avoid TikTok blocks.
